mapper.select: SELECT al.id, al.article_id AS articleId, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, a.created_at AS createdAt, al.created_at AS likedAt, CASE WHEN a.id IS NULL OR a.is_deleted = true THEN true ELSE false END AS isDeleted FROM tb_article_like al LEFT JOIN tb_article a ON al.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY al.created_at DESC
